---
title: "Capstone Project"
author: "MK NYARKO"
date: "2025-10-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Loading the dataset from Github Repository
url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mkNyarko/capstonemph/refs/heads/main/semaglutide_cleanPS_capstone.csv"
data <- read_csv(url)
head(data)
```
